Written Test: Applicable for Graduate Engineer Apprentices and Technician Apprentices. Interview: For Graduate Engineer Apprentices who qualify the Written Test. Practical Test: For Technician Apprentices who qualify the Written Test.

content_sections.heading: Goa Shipyard Apprenticeship Bharti 2026 – Quick Overview
content_sections.text: Candidates searching for the GSL Apprentice Vacancy 2026 details can refer to the quick summary below for an instant overview of the post, organization, total vacancies, last date, and application mode. This apprenticeship is conducted under the Apprentices Act 1961 and Apprenticeship (Amendment) Rules 2025.

rows.details: Apprenticeship Training (Graduate Engineer / Technician / Non-Engineering Graduate)

content_sections.heading: GSL Apprenticeship 2026 – Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates wondering about the Goa Shipyard Apprenticeship Training 2026 timeline should note that the last date for receipt of applications at GSL's office is 15 July 2026 . GSL will not be liable for any delay in receipt of application for whatsoever reason, so candidates are advised to send their applications well in advance.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Applications

content_sections.heading: Goa Shipyard Limited Apprenticeship Vacancy 2026 – Discipline-wise Breakdown
content_sections.text: The Goa Shipyard Apprentice Vacancy 2026 is distributed across three streams - Graduate Engineers, Technician Apprentices, and Non-Engineering Graduates - covering a total of 50 seats. Candidates should apply only for the discipline relevant to their educational qualification.

content_sections.heading: Goa Shipyard Apprenticeship 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Reservation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD candidates will be as per Government of India rules. The management also reserves the right to raise the eligibility criteria, including increasing the cut-off percentage, for the purpose of shortlisting applications.

rows.required_qualification: B.E. / B.Tech in the respective discipline (passed in 2024, 2025, or 2026)
Diploma in Engineering in the respective discipline (passed in 2024, 2025, or 2026)
B.Com , B.A ., or B.Sc . (passed in 2024, 2025, or 2026)

content_sections.heading: GSL Apprenticeship Training 2026 – Monthly Stipend
content_sections.text: Candidates wondering about the stipend for the Goa Shipyard Limited Apprenticeship Training 2026 can refer to the stream-wise monthly stipend details below. Candidates must note that this is a purely apprenticeship training programme and is not a monthly salary or regular employment offer. While no regular employment is guaranteed after training, subject to availability of resources, candidates may be considered for Advanced Training or Trainee Project Executive roles in shipbuilding activities at the discretion of the Management. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: Goa Shipyard Apprentice 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection for the GSL Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026 follows a two-stage process that differs by stream. Graduate Engineer Apprentices are selected through a Written Test followed by an Interview, while Technician Apprentices undergo a Written Test followed by a Practical Test. Only candidates who clear the Written Test will be called for the subsequent Interview or Practical Test. Written Test: Applicable for Graduate Engineer Apprentices and Technician Apprentices. Interview: For Graduate Engineer Apprentices who qualify the Written Test. Practical Test: For Technician Apprentices who qualify the Written Test. No TA/DA will be paid to shortlisted candidates called for the test or interview, as this is an apprenticeship engagement and not a regular employment recruitment.

content_sections.heading: Goa Shipyard Apprenticeship 2026 Apply Offline
content_sections.text: Candidates eligible for the GSL Apprenticeship Apply 2026 process must send their typed application only by post; applications submitted via email or any other mode will not be considered. Below are the step-by-step instructions to correctly complete and submit the application. Visit www.goashipyard.in and download the prescribed application format. Type the application form completely with all required personal, category, and educational details. Paste a recent passport-size photograph on the top right corner of the application. Attach attested copies of all relevant certificates (educational qualification, caste certificate if applicable, etc.). Write the discipline/trade applied for along with the word "Apprenticeships" on the outer envelope. Send the complete application by post to: Head of Department (HR & Admn.), Goa Shipyard Limited, Vaddem, Vasco-Da-Gama, Goa – 403 802. Ensure the application reaches GSL on or before 15 July 2026 .

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid in Goa Shipyard Apprenticeship Bharti 2026
content_sections.text: Many candidates make avoidable errors while applying for the Goa Shipyard Limited Apprenticeship Bharti 2026 that can lead to outright rejection without further correspondence. Sending the application by email instead of by post, since emailed applications are explicitly not accepted. Using a self-made format instead of the prescribed application format available on www.goashipyard.in. Submitting the application without attesting copies of all relevant certificates or without pasting a passport-size photograph. Applying after having already completed an apprenticeship in the same trade, which makes the candidate ineligible. Forgetting to write the discipline/trade and the word "Apprenticeships" on the envelope, which can misdirect the application. Sending the application close to the last date, risking postal delays since GSL will not be liable for late receipt.

faq.question: Q1. Has Goa Shipyard Limited officially released the Apprenticeship Training 2026 notification?
faq.answer: Yes, Goa Shipyard Limited has officially released the Apprenticeship Training 2026 notification for 50 vacancies across Graduate Engineer, Technician, and Non-Engineering Graduate streams under the Apprentices Act 1961 and Apprenticeship (Amendment) Rules 2025.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for GSL Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of applications at Goa Shipyard Limited is 15 July 2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available in Goa Shipyard Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: There are 50 total vacancies: 15 Graduate Engineer Apprentices (B.E./B.Tech), 5 Technician Apprentices (Diploma), and 30 Non-Engineering Graduate Apprentices (B.Com, B.A., B.Sc.).

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for Goa Shipyard Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this apprenticeship programme.

faq.question: Q5. Who is eligible for Goa Shipyard Apprenticeship Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates who completed their Degree or Diploma in 2024, 2025, or 2026 in the relevant discipline are eligible. Those who have not done any apprenticeship earlier, or have completed only one apprenticeship in a different trade at least one year before this advertisement, are eligible to apply.

faq.question: Q6. What is the monthly stipend for GSL Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: Graduate Engineer and Non-Engineering Graduate Apprentices receive ₹12,300 per month in the first year; Technician Apprentices receive ₹10,900 per month; Non-Engineering Graduate Apprentices receive ₹13,530 per month in the second year.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Goa Shipyard Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: Graduate Engineer Apprentices are selected through a Written Test followed by an Interview, while Technician Apprentices undergo a Written Test followed by a Practical Test.

faq.question: Q8. Will candidates get regular employment after GSL Apprenticeship Training 2026?
faq.answer: No, this is a purely apprenticeship training programme and regular employment is not guaranteed after completion of training. However, candidates may be considered for Advanced Training or Trainee Project Executive roles at Management's discretion.

faq.question: Q9. How can candidates apply for Goa Shipyard Apprenticeship 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must send a typed application in the prescribed format along with attested copies of all relevant certificates and a passport-size photograph by post to Head of Department (HR & Admn.), Goa Shipyard Limited, Vaddem, Vasco-Da-Gama, Goa – 403 802 on or before 15 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application format for GSL Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The prescribed application format is available for download on the official website www.goashipyard.in. Only applications in this prescribed format will be accepted.
